name: Alley
text: +1 Card +1 Action Discard a card. | You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Aristocrat
text: If the number of Aristocrats you have in play is: 1 or +3 Actions; 2 or +3 Cards; 3 or +(3); 4 or +3 Buys.

name: Artist
text: +1 Action +1 Card per card you have exactly one copy of in play.

name: Change
text: If you have any <_>, +(3). Otherwise, trash a card from your hand, and gain a card costing more (_) than it. +<_> equal to the difference in (_).

name: Craftsman
text: +(2) Gain a card costing up to (5).

name: Daimyo
text: +1 Card +1 Action The next time you play a nonCommand Action card this turn, replay it afterwards.

name: Fishmonger
text: +1 Buy +(1) | You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Gold Mine
text: +1 Card +1 Action +1 Buy You may gain a Gold and get +(4).

name: Imperial Envoy
text: +5 Cards +1 Buy +(2)

name: Kitsune
text: Choose two different options: +2 Actions; +(2); each other player gains a Curse; gain a Silver.

name: Litter
text: +2 Cards +2 Actions +(1)

name: Mountain Shrine
text: +(2) You may trash a card from your hand. Then if there are any Action cards in the trash, +2 Cards.

name: Ninja
text: +1 Card Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. | You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Poet
text: +1 Card +1 Action Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs (3) or less, put it into your hand.

name: Rice
text: +1 Buy +(1) per different type among cards you have in play.

name: Rice Broker
text: +1 Action Trash a card from your hand. If its a Treasure, +2 Cards. If its an Action, +5 Cards.

name: River Shrine
text: Trash up to 2 cards from your hand. At the start of Cleanup, if you didnt gain any cards in your Buy phase this turn, gain a card costing up to (4).

name: Riverboat
text: At the start of your next turn, play the set aside card, leaving it there. | Setup: Set aside an unused nonDuration Action card costing (5).

name: Ronin
text: Draw until you have 7 cards in hand. | You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Root Cellar
text: +3 Cards +1 Action +(3)

name: Rustic Village
text: +1 Card +2 Actions You may discard 2 cards for +1 Card.

name: Samurai
text: Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand (once). At the start of each of your turns this game, +(1). (This stays in play.)

name: Snake Witch
text: +1 Card +1 Action If your hand has no duplicate cards, you may reveal it and return this to its pile, to have each other player gain a Curse.

name: Tanuki
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to (2) more than it. | You can play this from your deck as if in your hand.

name: Tea House
text: +1 Card +1 Action +(2)

name: Amass
text: If you have no Action cards in play, gain an Action card costing up to (5).

name: Asceticism
text: Pay any amount of (_) to trash that many cards from your hand.

name: Continue
text: Once per turn: Gain a nonAttack Action card costing up to (4). Return to your Action phase and play it. +1 Action and +1 Buy.

name: Credit
text: Gain an Action or Treasure costing up to (8). +<_> equal to its cost.

name: Foresight
text: Reveal cards from your deck until revealing an Action. Set it aside and discard the rest. Put it into your hand at end of turn.

name: Gather
text: Gain a card costing exactly (3), a card costing exactly (4), and a card costing exactly (5).

name: Kintsugi
text: Trash a card from your hand. If youve gained a Gold this game, gain a card costing up to (2) more than the trashed card.

name: Practice
text: You may play an Action card from your hand twice.

name: Receive Tribute
text: If youve gained at least 3 cards this turn, gain up to 3 differently named Action cards you dont have copies of in play.

name: Sea Trade
text: +1 Card per Action card you have in play. Trash up to that many cards from your hand.

name: Approaching Army
text: After you play an Attack card, +(1). | Setup: Add an Attack kingdom card pile to the Supply.

name: Biding Time
text: At the start of your Cleanup, set aside your hand face down. At the start of your next turn, put those cards into your hand.

name: Bureaucracy
text: When you gain a card that doesnt cost (0), gain a Copper.

name: Divine Wind
text: When you remove the last remove all Kingdom card piles from the Supply, and set up 10 new random piles.

name: Enlightenment
text: Treasures are also Actions. When you play a Treasure in an Action phase, instead of following its instructions, +1 Card and +1 Action.

name: Flourishing Trade
text: Cards cost (1) less. You may use Action plays as Buys.

name: Good Harvest
text: The first time you play each differently named Treasure each turn, first, +1 Buy and +(1).

name: Great Leader
text: After each Action card you play, +1 Action.

name: Growth
text: When you gain a Treasure, gain a cheaper card.

name: Harsh Winter
text: When you gain a card on your turn, if theres <_> on its pile, take it; otherwise put on its pile.

name: Kind Emperor
text: At the start of your turn, and when you remove the last Gain an Action to your hand.

name: Panic
text: When you play a Treasure, +2 Buys, and when you discard one from play, return it to its pile.

name: Progress
text: When you gain a card, put it onto your deck.

name: Rapid Expansion
text: When you gain an Action or Treasure, set it aside, and play it at the start of your next turn.

name: Sickness
text: At the start of your turn, choose one: Gain a Curse onto your deck; or discard 3 cards.
